modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Received unexpected messages in Duo Mobile at 5 AM.

full_description_text: The user got four messages in Duo Mobile early in the morning. They weren't working at that time, so it was quite strange. The error message mentioned needing a WiFi or cellular connection. The user is unsure why this happened.
short_description: Received unexpected messages in Duo Mobile at 5 AM.
description: The user got four messages in Duo Mobile early in the morning. They weren't working at that time, so it was quite strange. The error message mentioned needing a WiFi or cellular connection. The user is unsure why this happened.
